# Martin's Moving

> Martin's Moving is a family-owned and operated moving company in Bradenton, Florida, serving Bradenton, Sarasota, and Manatee County since 2004. Services range from residential, commercial, local, and long-distance moving to packing, storage, and specialty work such as piano, pool table, and hot tub moving. The company is licensed, bonded, and insured (FL Mover Reg #IM595) and provides free written estimates.

Phone: (941) 809-5777. Email: martinsmoving2002@aol.com. Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30am to 5:30pm, with 24/7 emergency service. Address: 6721 2nd Avenue Cir W, Bradenton, FL 34209. Quotes are free with no obligation, and the company offers price matching. To get a quote, call or use the contact form. Most services also have a Sarasota-specific page, listed in the sitemap.

## Services
- [All services](https://www.martinsmover.com/services): Overview of every moving service offered.
- [Residential moving](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/residential-moving): Home moves, from studio apartments to multi-bedroom houses.
- [Commercial and office moving](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/commercial-moving): Office, retail, and commercial relocations scheduled to limit downtime.
- [Local moving](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/local-moving): Short-distance moves within Bradenton, Sarasota, and Manatee County.
- [Interstate movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/interstate-movers): State-to-state moves with written pricing and one point of contact.
- [Long distance movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/long-distance-movers): Long-haul moves beyond the local area.
- [Cross-country movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/cross-country-movers): Coast-to-coast relocations.
- [International moving](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/international-moving): Moves to destinations abroad.
- [Professional packing](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/professional-packing): Packing handled by the crew.
- [Packers and movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/packers-and-movers): Packing and moving combined in one booking.
- [Full-service movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/full-service-movers): Packing, loading, transport, and unpacking end to end.
- [Boxes and supplies](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/boxes-supplies): Moving boxes and packing materials.
- [Moving and storage](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/moving-and-storage): Moving paired with short or long-term storage.
- [Climate-controlled storage](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/climate-controlled-storage): Temperature-controlled storage for sensitive items.
- [Warehouse storage](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/warehouse-storage): Warehouse storage for household or commercial goods.
- [Apartment movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/apartment-movers): Apartment and condo moves, including stairs and elevators.
- [Furniture movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/furniture-movers): Moving single pieces or full sets of furniture.
- [Appliance movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/appliance-movers): Moving large appliances such as refrigerators and washers.
- [Piano movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/piano-movers): Moving grand and upright pianos.
- [Steinway piano movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/steinway-piano-movers): Specialist handling for Steinway and other fine pianos.
- [Pool table movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/pool-table-movers): Disassembly, transport, and setup of pool tables.
- [Hot tub movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/hot-tub-movers): Moving hot tubs and spas.
- [Specialty and difficult items](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/specialty-items): Safes, antiques, and oversized or awkward items.
- [White glove movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/white-glove-movers): Premium, full-care moving service.
- [VIP movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/vip-movers): Discreet, high-touch moves.
- [Home staging](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/home-staging): Moving and placing furniture for home staging.
- [Car shipping](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/car-shipping): Vehicle transport.
- [Senior relocation](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/senior-relocation): Downsizing and moves for seniors.
- [Dorm room movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/dorm-room-movers): Student and dorm moves.
- [Small moves](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/small-moves): Single items and small loads.
- [Emergency movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/emergency-movers): Urgent moves, including 24/7 service.
- [Last-minute movers](https://www.martinsmover.com/services/last-minute-movers): Short-notice moves.

- [Vamo](https://www.martinsmover.com/areas-served/vamo)
- [Panther Ridge](https://www.martinsmover.com/areas-served/panther-ridge)

- [Bird Key](https://www.martinsmover.com/areas-served/bird-key)

## Moving guides
- [All guides](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides): Index of the moving guides.
- [Ultimate moving guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/ultimate-moving-guide): Start-to-finish overview of planning a move.
- [House moving guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/house-moving-guide): Moving a house or larger home.
- [Long distance moving guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/long-distance-moving-guide): What to expect on state-to-state moves.
- [Business moving guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/business-moving-guide): Planning an office or commercial relocation.
- [Senior relocation guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/senior-relocation-guide): Help for downsizing and senior moves.
- [How-to pack guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/how-to-pack-guide): Packing methods by room and item type.
- [International moving guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/international-moving-guide): Considerations for moving abroad.
- [Moving checklist and planning guide](https://www.martinsmover.com/guides/moving-checklist): Timeline and checklist for a move.

## Resources and forms
- [All resources](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources): Index of resources and forms.
- [Packing tips](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/packing-tips): Practical packing advice.
- [How to prepare for a move](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/how-to-prepare-for-a-move): Steps to take before moving day.
- [Average moving times](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/average-moving-times): How long different moves typically take.
- [Moving forms](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/moving-forms): Forms used during the moving process.
- [Materials order form](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/materials-order-form): Order packing materials and supplies.
- [Printable moving checklist](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/moving-checklist-printable): A checklist you can print.
- [FAQs](https://www.martinsmover.com/resources/faqs): Answers to common moving questions.

## Company
- [About](https://www.martinsmover.com/about): Company background and team.
- [What to expect](https://www.martinsmover.com/what-to-expect): How a move with Martin's Moving works, step by step.
- [Reviews](https://www.martinsmover.com/reviews): Customer reviews and ratings.
- [Blog](https://www.martinsmover.com/blog): Articles on moving in the Bradenton and Sarasota area.
- [Contact and free quote](https://www.martinsmover.com/contact): Request a call back or free written estimate.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.martinsmover.com/privacy-policy): How the site handles personal information.
- [Accessibility](https://www.martinsmover.com/accessibility): Accessibility statement.
